calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Margaret Del Coto. Petitioner Chun Si Lin was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing name to Danny Kam Hung Chen. Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-21-2003 Reset To Apr-22-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Valerie Papale. Petitioner, Chun Si Lin was sworn and examined through his Cantonese Interpreter. No appearance by the father. Petition for Name Change is missing the father's signature, therefore the matter is continued to April 22, 2003 at 09:00 A.M.
